allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace deprecated Bootstrap CSS classes in templates

- Replace card-columns with row row-cols grid \(removed in BS5\)
- Remove card-inverse class \(removed in BS5\)
- Fix card-sutitle typo to card-subtitle
- Replace form-group with mb-3 \(removed in BS5\)
- Replace help-block with form-text \(BS5 naming\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Migrate DataTables from Bootstrap 4 to Bootstrap 5

- Replace datatables.net-bs4 with datatables.net-bs5 dependency
- Add Webpack Encore entrypoint for DataTables \(assets/js/datatables.js\)
- Replace static script tags with encore_entry_script_tags in
  fireworks and komfortofen analysis templates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update Typeahead SCSS to use Bootstrap 5 CSS custom properties

- Replace hardcoded BS4 colors with CSS custom properties:
  #373a3c → var\(--bs-body-color\)
  #0275d8 → var\(--bs-primary\)
  #818a91 → var\(--bs-secondary-color\)
  #2b2d2f → var\(--bs-emphasis-color\)
  #f5f5f5 → var\(--bs-tertiary-bg\)
  #fff \(bg\) → var\(--bs-body-bg\)
- Remove obsolete IE filter hack \(progid:DXImageTransform\)
- Remove -ms-flex and -webkit-box-flex vendor prefixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge branch ''main'' into dependabot/npm_and_yarn/form-data-2.5.5

Resolve yarn.lock conflict.
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Replace typeahead.js with Algolia Autocomplete" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

- Replace outdated `corejs-typeahead` and `bloodhound-js` with modern `@algolia/autocomplete-js`
- Remove `handlebars` dependency as templates are now built inline with tagged template literals
- Update SCSS styling for the new autocomplete component with Bootstrap 5 integration
- Improve form submit handling and input synchronization

## Changes

### Removed dependencies
- `corejs-typeahead`
- `bloodhound-js`
- `handlebars`
- `handlebars-loader`

### Added dependencies
- `@algolia/autocomplete-js`
- `@algolia/autocomplete-theme-classic`

### Benefits of the new solution
- Modern, actively maintained library
- No jQuery dependency
- Better accessibility support
- Cleaner API with tagged template literals
- Smaller bundle size \(no Handlebars runtime needed\)
- Built-in keyboard navigation

## Test plan
- [ ] Test city search autocomplete
- [ ] Test station search autocomplete
- [ ] Test remote geocoding search
- [ ] Test form submission with Enter key
- [ ] Test clicking on autocomplete suggestions
- [ ] Verify styling in both light and dark mode
- [ ] Test on mobile devices

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix HTML escaping in autocomplete header templates

Header templates were returning plain strings which Algolia Autocomplete
escaped as text. Now using the html template function for proper rendering.
Also moved panel styles to global scope since Algolia appends the panel
to body, not inside the container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add maplibre-gl and maplibre-gl-leaflet dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Replace map tiles with OpenFreeMap" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Add `maplibre-gl` and `@maplibre/maplibre-gl-leaflet` as dependencies
- Replace Wikimedia raster tiles \(hosted on `tiles.caldera.cc`\) with OpenFreeMap vector tiles using the `liberty` style
- Update map attribution to credit OpenFreeMap, OpenMapTiles, and OpenStreetMap

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify maps render correctly on station pages
- [ ] Verify city overview map works with markers
- [ ] Verify coordinate-based map displays correctly
- [ ] Check attribution is visible

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "Add GitHub Actions CI for PHPUnit and PHPStan" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Fix `phpunit.xml` to point to the actual `tests/` directory instead of Symfony monorepo paths
- Add PHPStan as dev dependency with level 5 configuration \(`phpstan.neon`\)
- Add GitHub Actions workflow for PHPUnit tests
- Add GitHub Actions workflow for PHPStan static analysis

Both workflows run on pushes to `main` and on pull requests.

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify PHPUnit workflow runs and tests pass
- [ ] Verify PHPStan workflow runs and analysis passes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix CI: upgrade phpunit-bridge, generate PHPStan baseline, fix broken tests

- Upgrade symfony/phpunit-bridge from ^4.3 to ^7.1 to fix AnnotationRegistry
  incompatibility with doctrine/annotations 2.0
- Generate phpstan-baseline.neon for existing errors and exclude src/Consumer/
  \(references uninstalled OldSound\\RabbitMqBundle\)
- Fix missing return in AbstractPollutantViewModelFactory::getPollutantById\(\)
- Fix UVIndex test assertions to match current source values
- Remove Co2CachedDataRetrieverTest referencing deleted classes
- Separate Controller integration tests into own suite, run only unit tests in CI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr edit 451 --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Add GitHub Actions workflows for PHPUnit tests and PHPStan static analysis
- Fix `phpunit.xml` to point to the actual `tests/` directory instead of Symfony monorepo paths
- Add PHPStan as dev dependency with level 5 configuration and generated baseline for existing errors
- Upgrade `symfony/phpunit-bridge` from `^4.3` to `^7.1` to fix incompatibility with `doctrine/annotations` 2.0
- Fix broken unit tests \(outdated UVIndex assertions, removed obsolete Co2CachedDataRetrieverTest\)
- Separate Controller integration tests \(requiring Redis/DB\) from unit test suite

Both workflows run on pushes to `main` and on pull requests.

## Changes
- `.github/workflows/tests.yml` — PHPUnit CI workflow \(unit tests only\)
- `.github/workflows/phpstan.yml` — PHPStan CI workflow
- `phpstan.neon` / `phpstan-baseline.neon` — PHPStan config with baseline for 146 pre-existing errors
- `phpunit.xml` — split into "Project Test Suite" \(unit\) and "Integration" \(controller\) suites
- `composer.json` / `composer.lock` — upgraded `symfony/phpunit-bridge` to `^7.1`
- Fixed `AbstractPollutantViewModelFactory::getPollutantById\(\)` missing return path
- Fixed `UVIndexTest` and `UVIndexPollutionLevelTest` assertions to match current source
- Removed `Co2CachedDataRetrieverTest` \(referenced deleted classes\)

## Test plan
- [x] Verify PHPUnit workflow runs and tests pass
- [x] Verify PHPStan workflow runs and analysis passes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
